summary: Phone OTP gate added to the Demo form. Backend verified end-to-end via curl (mock SMS). Frontend wired into DemoForm.jsx; compiles clean (only pre-existing CmsProvider eslint warning).
sms_mode: OTP_SMS_ENABLED=false (mock — codes logged, no live SMS). Owner must flip to true for a real end-to-end SMS test.

6th attempt -> 'Too many incorrect attempts. Please request a new code.'
lead saved, otp_verified=true, no OTP-Unverified tag
lead STILL saved, otp_verified=false, Freshsales tag 'OTP-Unverified'

files_touched: backend/server.py (otp endpoints + demo-request otp_token gate + startup index)
